race.comment: This race somewhat revolves around the resuming EPIMELES (4) who is off a 19-month spell. He looked very talented early doors with two strong wins, the second at Listed level, then things didn't go to plan last time in when injury struck. 1200m is probably on the sharp side but he's been trialling very well. Might just be too good if he's right. KING TUT (12) won well fresh and got home strongly last start at Sandown Lakeside to grab second. Drawn wide here but if they keep him midfield rather than go back he'll be very hard to hold out. KA YING CHEER (2) has won all three since coming to Australia, just getting the job done here last time. Up in the weights now but should be right there. WOLFY (6) has been good his past couple, he just needs everything to go his way given his racing pattern. HE'LL RIP (1) resumes. 1400m is his trip but he's certainly good enough.
